memberdef.argsstring: (self, Optional[str] line_type, Optional[int] level_1, Optional[int] level_2, Optional[Union[bool, str]] can_be_multiline)
memberdef.name: __init__

\par \b Purpose\/ \: get_hierarchy_level method \par \b I/O\/ \: Input -> Output \par \b Complexity\/ \: 5
\par \b Purpose\/ \: AbstractPattern for document structure extraction pipeline

detaileddescription.para: Base class for all patterns to configure structure extraction by :class:~dedoc.structure_extractors.DefaultStructureExtractor.
